problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photodynamic. Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors directly addresses this.
